linkedin.text: The brief: fly 800 top performers to Mallorca, deliver three days that feel effortless, lose no one and miss no minute. 🎯 The result: 14 chartered transfers, 800 rooms across two resorts, a beachfront gala for the full group, and a 96% satisfaction score on the post-trip survey. Not one logistics complaint reached the client — because that's our job, not theirs. This is what "from business to pleasure" looks like at scale. Planning a large-group incentive and worried it can't run this smoothly? It can. 📩 Book a free scoping call — link in bio. #UproductionEvents #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #Mallorca #EventProduction #CaseStudy #IncentiveTrip #B2BEvents

image_prompt: Elevated wide shot from behind a crowd of around 800 corporate guests filling a grand Mallorca seaside venue at night, all viewed from the rear so faces are tiny, warm amber stage glow ahead of them washing over the sea of heads, palm silhouettes framing the edges, dark Balearic coastline and night sky beyond. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
